name: docs-hygiene
description: Teach coding agents to govern documentation, Domain topology, and Library fan-out with Docs Hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic documentation governance for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Audit project documentation structure, Domain and Sub Domain topology, Library fan-out budgets, identities, representations, contracts, references, and traceability with the Docs Hygiene CLI.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project with Docs Hygiene and explain the violations.
Repair the Docs Hygiene diagnostics in this repository.
